primary_claim: scVI-inclusive core benchmark confirms that NB objective improvement alone is not a sufficient selector for latent-state recovery.
claim_boundary: Bounded simulation optimizer-sensitivity figure with scVI included as a latent baseline; not a full deep generative benchmark or biological validation.

primary_claim: Core NB-family convergence diagnostics show that lower NB objective can diverge from latent-state RMSE and downstream utility.
claim_boundary: Bounded simulation optimizer-sensitivity figure; supports validation-aware selection, not objective-only convergence or biological validation.

primary_claim: FibroDynMix is organized as a raw-count generative mixture framework with latent fibroblast state simplex, hierarchical study/donor effects, uncertainty outputs, and transition-flow inference.
claim_boundary: Architecture and evidence-map figure; not a standalone biological validation or complete Bayesian VI implementation.
current_scope: NB optimizer, study/donor-effect optimization, study-effect calibration, bootstrap uncertainty, logistic-normal VI posterior skeleton, transition flow, public raw-count smoke run, leave-study-out transfer benchmark, and public real-data transfer smoke.
remaining_scope: Full amortized or fully hierarchical VI posterior over all parameters and completed human disease-atlas or cross-atlas generalization.

primary_claim: FibroDynMix runs on a balanced public raw-count fibroblast subset and yields coherent state composition, FPI, and cross-sectional transition-flow readouts.
claim_boundary: Public mouse pooled-count demonstration; not a disease-mechanism result without full QC, replicated donors, and validation.

primary_claim: FibroDynMix benchmarking quantifies state-mixture recovery, posterior VI behavior, confounding robustness, rare-transition detection, and learned marker-program recovery.
claim_boundary: Computational simulation benchmark with known latent truth; not biological causal validation.

primary_claim: A ridge-penalized study effect can absorb cohort-level expression shifts while retaining state-mixture recovery within a selected penalty range.
claim_boundary: Simulation-calibrated study-effect penalty selection under batch confounding; not a real-cohort biological claim.

primary_claim: FibroDynMix state compositions and transfer diagnostics support conserved and disease-context-specific fibroblast plasticity across independent GSE167339 and scar/fibrosis-context human fibroblast datasets.
claim_boundary: External public-data validation using bounded sampled/capped outputs. GSE167339 Human3 hash groups support donor robustness only; GSE156326/GSE181316 module contrasts are descriptive small-sample pseudobulk effects and do not pass FDR significance.

primary_claim: FibroDynMix estimates condition-associated state flow and a cell-level plasticity index from latent state mixtures.
claim_boundary: Cross-sectional inferred state flow and FPI from simulated data; not lineage tracing or observed temporal transition.

primary_claim: FibroDynMix executes end-to-end on public raw UMI fibroblast count data and yields auditable NB, state composition, FPI, and transition-flow outputs.
claim_boundary: Technical smoke test only; not a disease-mechanism result without full QC, biological replication, cell curation, and sensitivity analysis.

primary_claim: Cell bootstrap provides uncertainty summaries for state composition, cell entropy, and marker-program stability.
claim_boundary: Bootstrap uncertainty summaries from simulated data; not full Bayesian posterior credible intervals.
